meta.title: What Makes the Middle Class Ticked: A Conversation with Mickey Kaus
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with Mickey Kaus, journalist and author of “The End of Equality,” which chronicles the crises facing the middle class and the dynamics that drive much of the alienation and frustration displayed across the country. Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Walter Russell Mead will moderate the conversation.
